package.name: patrol_interfaces
package.description: Custom messages/services/actions for the patrol-drone stack. M2 ships this as an empty-but-buildable ament_cmake IDL-host shell (design 01-platform C8). The CheckpointCapture message fields are owned by 04-perception (M6, OQ-8) — this shell defines no fields, only the landing slot and the dependencies that message will need so 04's drop-in is a one-file add.
